expertAssessments.rationale: GitLab tag deploy pipeline, production /api/version, Vercel deployment readiness, Cloud Run /health, and free-tier guardrails all passed for v8.12.78.

The release includes the landing MouseSpotlight halo removal and production version propagation succeeded. No new frontend availability issue was observed in route smoke.
The Q5 contextual label fix remains included in the deployed release, and the prior targeted production QA-20260529-0641 already validated the AI behavior with durable evidence.
